title: rosa graveolens subsp. eriophora
intro: Rosa graveolens subsp. eriophora, also known as the Damask rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa graveolens plant, characterized by its intense fragrance and delicate appearance. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and anxiety, as well as its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa graveolens subsp. eriophora include its potential to improve sleep quality, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Rosa graveolens subsp. eriophora is commonly used in herbal preparations such as rose oil, rosewater, and dried rose petals, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and herbal teas.
